requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Coastal Cyclone Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及沿海气旋降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及沿海氣旋降額

summary.en: Samoa does not appear to have a strong dedicated EVSE standards body or a publicly confirmed EVSE-specific national whole-unit certification rule. In practice, project owners, EPC, insurers, and importers should require IEC-family safety evidence for conductive charging equipment. IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for EV supply equipment general requirements, including control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV supply equipment. Samoa's coastal tropical setting also requires documented enclosure protection, corrosion resistance, salt-mist exposure, humidity tolerance, wind/cyclone anchoring, drainage, UV resistance, and heat derating.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚似乎没有强力专门EVSE标准机构，也未从公开官方来源确认EVSE整机专门国家认证规则。实务上，项目业主、EPC、保险方和进口商应要求传导式充电设备提供IEC体系安全证据。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车供电设备通用要求的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流和过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车供电设备。萨摩亚热带沿海环境还要求形成外壳防护、耐腐蚀、盐雾暴露、湿度耐受、风/气旋固定、排水、抗UV和热降额文件。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞似乎沒有強力專門EVSE標準機構，也未從公開官方來源確認EVSE整機專門國家認證規則。實務上，項目業主、EPC、保險方和進口商應要求傳導式充電設備提供IEC體系安全證據。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車供電設備通用要求的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流和過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車供電設備。薩摩亞熱帶沿海環境還要求形成外殼防護、耐腐蝕、鹽霧暴露、濕度耐受、風/氣旋固定、排水、抗UV和熱降額文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 - Electric vehicle conductive charging system - Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 - DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 - Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 60068 family - environmental testing including damp heat and salt mist where specified
Project-specific EPC, installer, insurer, and owner safety requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence is useful as a design starting point but does not substitute for IEC 61851 evidence, IEC 62196 connector evidence, or environmental test documentation accepted by a Samoa project owner, EPC-connected site, insurer, or importer.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023证据可作为设计起点，但不能替代萨摩亚项目业主、EPC接入场站、保险方或进口商认可的IEC 61851证据、IEC 62196接口证据或环境测试文件。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023證據可作為設計起點，但不能替代薩摩亞項目業主、EPC接入場站、保險方或進口商認可的IEC 61851證據、IEC 62196接口證據或環境測試文件。

standards_or_laws: China domestic environmental and enclosure tests where specified

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP and IK enclosure certificates, protective-device ratings, installation instructions, and environmental evidence for salt mist, high humidity, tropical heat, corrosion, cyclone wind loading, and outdoor anchoring. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 evidence without a clause-level gap assessment and project-owner acceptance.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、IP和IK外壳证书、保护器件额定值、安装说明，以及针对盐雾、高湿、热带高温、腐蚀、气旋风载和户外固定的环境证据。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估并取得项目业主接受的情况下，不应视为IEC 61851证据。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、IP和IK外殼證書、保護器件額定值、安裝說明，以及針對鹽霧、高濕、熱帶高溫、腐蝕、氣旋風載和戶外固定的環境證據。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估並取得項目業主接受的情況下，不應視為IEC 61851證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where required by EPC-connected site, importer, insurer, project owner, or tender; a Samoa EVSE-specific national whole-unit certification rule was not confirmed from public official sources
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not a direct IEC 61851 or Samoa project-acceptance substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Samoa-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where relevant, enclosure certificates, and tropical coastal derating evidence for salt mist, humidity, corrosion, heat, and cyclone exposure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向萨摩亚的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、适用时的直流站IEC 61851-23证据、外壳证书，以及针对盐雾、湿度、腐蚀、高温和气旋暴露的热带沿海降额证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向薩摩亞的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、適用時的直流站IEC 61851-23證據、外殼證書，以及針對鹽霧、濕度、腐蝕、高溫和氣旋暴露的熱帶沿海降額證據。
